channel.title: Data on Pivot
channel.description: Recent content in Data on Pivot

item.description:
• AI Backend Engineer — BrightNight — Builds backend services that ingest and process clean‑energy data, run AI models for solar/wind forecasting, and serve predictions to operators via APIs. Strong match because you’ll work on model‑serving infrastructure and data pipelines typical of production ML.
  • Gridware - Senior Platform Engineer — Gridware — Designs and operates a scalable platform for grid‑level analytics, real‑time monitoring, and automated dispatch of renewable resources. Ideal for production ML/MLOps experience as the role involves building data pipelines, model deployment, and platform reliability.
  • Founding Engineer / MLOps / Data Engineering — Few&Far — Joins as a founding engineer to construct MLOps pipelines and data infrastructure that power climate‑impact modeling and carbon‑tracking tools, scaling from prototype to production. Perfect fit for deep MLOps and data‑engineering expertise in a fast‑growing climate startup.
  • Software Engineer (+ Equity) — Axle Energy (Jack & Jill) — Develops software for energy‑asset management and optimization, integrating IoT data and analytics to improve efficiency of renewable installations. Your production‑grade software engineering background will be directly applicable to building reliable, scalable services.
  • IoT Platform Engineer - Energy Systems (f/m/d) — FION Energy — Creates an IoT platform that collects sensor streams from renewable‑energy sites, runs edge analytics, and feeds results into forecasting models for grid operators. This role leverages MLOps and data‑pipeline skills to turn raw sensor data into actionable insights.

Today’s Pick

AI Backend Engineer — BrightNight

Today’s Jobs

  • Lead AI Engineer — Powerline — Powerline builds AI‑driven forecasting and grid‑balancing platforms that help utilities integrate variable solar and wind power. The role will design, train, and serve these models at scale, managing data pipelines and monitoring to keep production systems reliable.

  • Potentially a great fit for [C]Worthy? — Convergent Research — Convergent Research creates software for tracking, analyzing, and modeling carbon emissions, enabling clients to quantify climate impact across portfolios. The MLOps focus means you’ll operationalize machine‑learning models, build robust data pipelines, and ensure scalable, reliable deployments.

Today’s Jobs

  • Software Engineer (Fully Remote) — Axiom Cloud — Builds a cloud platform that ingests sensor data from refrigeration units, runs ML models to optimize energy consumption and reduce emissions, and serves real‑time dashboards. This role matches production ML/MLOps experience by integrating predictive maintenance models and scaling data pipelines.

  • Staff Site Reliability Engineer — Arcadia — Operates and automates the renewable‑energy forecasting and grid‑management services that Arcadia provides, ensuring high‑availability of data pipelines and ML model serving for clean‑energy operators. The SRE expertise aligns with maintaining large‑scale ML workloads and monitoring production systems.

Today’s Jobs

Software engineer, AI product — Watershed — Watershed builds an enterprise carbon accounting platform that automates emissions measurement across scopes 1–3, using ML for emissions factor matching, invoice parsing, and supplier data extraction. This role focuses on productionizing ML models that turn messy procurement and utility data into audit-grade carbon inventories — direct fit for engineers who’ve built model serving pipelines, feature stores, and data quality monitoring at scale.

Today’s Jobs

  • Full Stack Engineer — Metrikflow — Metrikflow builds a platform for real‑time climate metric collection, processing sensor data from renewable installations and generating compliance reports; this full‑stack role requires designing scalable services and APIs, ideal for production ML/MLOps expertise.
  • Full Stack Engineer — Scanifly — Scanifly develops backend services for clean‑energy forecasting, grid balancing, and asset management using Python and Go; the full‑stack position involves building micro‑services, data pipelines, and monitoring—core skills for ML/MLOps engineers.
  • Software Engineer (+ Equity) at Axle Energy — Jack & Jill — Jack & Jill creates a peer‑to‑peer energy trading platform that matches renewable generation with demand using real‑time pricing algorithms; the platform engineering role focuses on building distributed systems, API gateways, and data pipelines, matching production software experience.
  • Staff Platform Engineer — GRIDSIGHT — GRIDSIGHT provides a real‑time grid visualization and control platform for utilities, ingesting SCADA data and running anomaly detection; the staff platform role leads the architecture of microservices, data ingestion layers, and scaling strategies, a strong fit for senior ML/MLOps backgrounds.
  • Senior Product Software Engineer (Python) - Tyba Energy — Tyba Energy delivers Python‑based tools for renewable portfolio optimization and market forecasting, serving as a SaaS product for traders; the senior engineer builds product features, integrates external data sources, and maintains CI/CD pipelines, aligning with production software engineering.
  • Powerline: Senior Optimization Software Engineer (Remote) - Jobs - Nextmv — Nextmv’s Powerline platform offers constraint‑based optimization for energy distribution, routing, and resource allocation; the remote senior engineer designs and deploys optimization services using Python and CPLEX/Gurobi, leveraging strong algorithmic and production‑grade coding skills.
  • MLOps-engineer voor uniek team! — Stichting Deltares — Deltares runs MLOps pipelines for flood prediction, water quality modeling, and climate impact analysis, processing terabytes of sensor and satellite data; the MLOps role focuses on container orchestration, model serving, and monitoring, directly applying production ML expertise.
  • MLOps Engineer — KNMI - Royal Netherlands Meteorological Institute — KNMI maintains MLOps infrastructure for weather forecasting models, real‑time data ingestion from radar and satellites, and model versioning; the engineer builds and scales the pipeline, ensuring low‑latency predictions—core to an MLOps background.
  • Sr. Software Engineer - Azure — Qcells North America — Qcells develops C++ services on Azure for solar farm monitoring, power conversion, and grid integration, handling thousands of inverters; the senior engineer designs cloud-native microservices, implements CI/CD, and supports large‑scale data processing, matching production engineering skills.
  • Data Engineer — Habitat Energy — Habitat Energy builds data pipelines that ingest, transform, and store sensor data from renewable generation sites, powering performance dashboards and forecasting models; the data engineer designs ETL workflows, manages data lakes, and ensures data quality, aligning with data‑pipeline experience.
  • Data Engineer — San Diego Community Power — San Diego Community Power processes electricity consumption and renewable generation data from utilities, feeding into outage analytics and load‑balancing tools; the data engineer creates scalable pipelines using Spark and SQL, supporting operational decision‑making.
  • Data Engineer — Brook Green Supply — Brook Green Supply tracks energy supply chains, carbon intensity, and sustainability reporting for commodity trading; the data engineer builds pipelines that merge ERP data, shipping logs, and environmental APIs, enabling accurate carbon accounting.
  • Data Engineer — Ohme — Ohme provides smart‑charging platforms for electric vehicles, collecting telemetry from chargers and vehicles; the data engineer designs pipelines to process charging patterns, optimize grid load, and support predictive maintenance.
  • Data Engineer — Octopus Energy — Octopus Energy ingests smart‑meter data, renewable generation feeds, and customer usage logs to fuel personalized energy insights; the data engineer builds large‑scale ETL pipelines, data warehouses, and real‑time analytics services.
  • Staff Product Design Engineer — Samsara — Samsara creates IoT hardware and software for fleet and environmental monitoring, including video analytics for safety and sustainability; the staff product design engineer leads the end‑to‑end product flow, from user research to implementation, interfacing closely with data pipelines and cloud services.
  • System Engineering Specialist (m/f/d) — Danfoss — Danfoss designs embedded control systems for HVAC and industrial equipment, integrating sensor data and optimization algorithms to improve energy efficiency; the system engineer develops firmware, communication protocols, and data aggregation services, applying production‑grade engineering.
  • Senior Data Scientist (Machine Learning Engineer) at Climate X — Climate X builds machine‑learning models for climate risk assessment and scenario forecasting, serving predictions via REST APIs; the senior ML engineer implements model training pipelines, version control, and monitoring, leveraging production ML and MLOps experience.

Today’s Pick

Full Stack Engineer — Metrikflow

Today’s Jobs

AI Engineer (AIX) — OVO — OVO supplies renewable electricity and gas to UK homes while building the Kaluza platform for smart EV charging, heat pump optimization, and grid flexibility services. This role focuses on productionizing ML models for energy demand forecasting, real-time device control, and dynamic tariff optimization — direct fit for engineers who’ve built model serving pipelines, feature stores, and monitoring for low-latency inference at scale.

Today’s Jobs

Senior Software Engineer, Growth — Samsara — Samsara builds an IoT platform for physical operations (fleet telematics, equipment monitoring, site visibility) with sustainability modules for fleet electrification planning, emissions tracking, and route optimization. This role focuses on video engineering — building pipelines for dashcam and site camera analytics, including on-device ML inference and large-scale video processing infrastructure.

Data Engineer - Ember - Jobs By Workable — Ember 1 — Ember (Ember Climate) is an energy think tank that builds open data pipelines and analytics platforms tracking the global electricity transition — coal phase-out, renewable growth, grid emissions factors, and power sector modeling. The role involves scaling ingestion from grid operators, satellite sources, and national statistics offices into reproducible, versioned datasets used by policymakers and researchers.

Today’s Jobs

Senior Software Engineer (x5 Roles) – Go, PHP, OOP, AWS, APIs, Full Stack Engineering - Remote — Areti Group — Areti Group builds grid flexibility and energy trading software that connects distributed assets to wholesale markets. The role demands production-grade Go/PHP services on AWS with API-heavy architecture — direct fit for engineers who’ve scaled event-driven systems and managed deployment pipelines.

Forward Deployed Engineer - Remote US — Pulsora — Pulsora operates a carbon data platform that ingests emissions data from ERP, utility, and sensor sources to automate GHG reporting. This position sits at the customer integration layer — building data pipelines, custom connectors, and model-serving endpoints — ideal for ML engineers who’ve productionized feature stores and monitored drift in regulated environments.

Today’s Jobs

  • Senior ML Engineer — AZX — AZX builds software for clean energy project development and grid interconnection, automating the complex permitting and utility studies that delay solar, wind, and storage deployment. This role owns model serving infrastructure and feature pipelines for predicting interconnection queue outcomes and project economics, a direct fit for someone who has shipped ML systems in production with strict latency and reliability requirements.

  • Senior Data Scientist (Machine Learning Engineer) — Climate X — Climate X provides physical climate risk analytics to financial institutions, insurers, and real asset owners, translating climate model outputs into asset-level flood, heat, and wind risk scores. The position involves productionizing geospatial ML pipelines that ingest CMIP6 data, satellite imagery, and lidar to train and serve hazard models at global scale — work that demands the same MLOps rigor (versioning, monitoring, drift detection) you’ve built for high-stakes production systems.

Today’s Jobs

Principal Architect, AI/ML — Jobgether — Jobgether connects professionals to sustainability roles and builds platforms for climate impact; this senior architect role requires designing ML systems at scale, ideal for someone with production ML infrastructure experience.

Principal Architect, AI/ML — Jobgether — Jobgether builds sustainability-focused platforms and seeks a principal ML architect to design scalable AI systems; the role demands production ML architecture experience for deploying models in real-world applications.

Today’s Jobs

Machine Learning Scientist – Remote Sensing — Treefera — Treefera uses satellite imagery and AI to monitor forest health and carbon sequestration. This role involves deploying and maintaining ML models for environmental monitoring, requiring expertise in model serving and production pipelines.

Machine Learning Operations Engineer — Storm4 — Storm4 builds AI-driven platforms for clean energy asset management and grid optimization. You’ll design and scale infrastructure for model deployment, focusing on reliability and performance in energy transition systems.

Today’s Jobs

ML & Platform Engineer: Geospatial AI for Climate & Grid at Asystem — — Asystem builds grid optimization software that uses geospatial AI to manage renewable energy distribution and grid stability. The role requires developing scalable ML infrastructure for real-time climate and grid data analysis, making it a strong match for engineers experienced in production ML systems and MLOps.

Gridmatic - Software Engineer, Grid-Scale Batteries — Gridmatic — Gridmatic develops software for controlling and optimizing grid-scale battery storage systems to support clean energy integration. This role involves building backend systems for energy dispatch and monitoring, aligning with ML engineers’ expertise in scalable infrastructure and data-driven decision-making.

Today’s Jobs

  • MLOps Engineer — Habitat Energy — Habitat Energy builds software that optimizes battery storage trading and grid-balancing operations in wholesale electricity markets. This role sits squarely in the MLOps lane — you’d own the infrastructure that serves and monitors ML models making real-time dispatch decisions for energy assets.

  • Engineering Manager, Full Stack & Data — Overstory — Overstory uses satellite imagery and ML to monitor vegetation encroachment on power lines for utilities. This is an engineering manager role spanning full-stack web tools and data pipelines, so it’s a partial fit — strong on the data/ML systems side, but also requires hands-on React.js and database design leadership.

Today’s Jobs

Sr. Software & Machine Learning Engineer, Energy Optimization — Tesla — Tesla builds battery storage systems (Powerwall, Megapack) and solar products, and this role involves developing ML models that optimize when and how energy is stored, dispatched, and traded. Strong fit for someone with production ML experience — you’d be working on real-time decision systems that run on deployed hardware. Based in Palo Alto.

Staff Machine Learning Engineer, Energy & Charging — Tesla — This role sits at the intersection of Tesla’s vehicle charging network and its energy products, building ML systems that manage charging load, grid interaction, and energy arbitrage. Staff-level scope means you’d own model pipelines end-to-end — training, serving, monitoring. Palo Alto.

Today’s Jobs

  • Senior Software Engineer, Scientific Computing — KoBold Metals — KoBold uses ML and remote sensing to identify subsurface mineral deposits for critical materials needed in clean energy hardware. The role focuses on building high-performance scientific computing infrastructure; strong fit if you’ve built GPU-backed ML pipelines and have experience with geospatial or numerical simulation stacks.

  • Senior Optimization Software Engineer — Powerline — Powerline builds software that optimizes solar-plus-storage dispatch at the fleet level, integrating real-time grid signals with battery forecasting models. The role involves building and deploying optimization engines — directly relevant if you’ve shipped ML-informed scheduling or energy management systems.

Today’s Jobs

Senior Software Engineer, Geospatial Data — Overstory — Overstory builds forest carbon monitoring software using satellite imagery and machine learning to track deforestation and carbon sequestration. This role requires production geospatial data engineering at scale, making it a strong match for senior software engineers with ML pipeline experience.

Machine Learning Engineer — Carbon Re — Carbon Re develops AI systems to optimize carbon capture processes for heavy industry, using machine learning to accelerate CO2 utilization. The role involves deploying and maintaining ML models in production environments, ideal for ML engineers with MLOps experience.

Today’s Jobs

  • Sr. Software Engineer (Integrations and Automations) — AllSpice.io — AllSpice.io builds a carbon accounting platform for the automotive and manufacturing sectors, tracking emissions across vehicle and robotics supply chains. This integrations-focused role is a strong fit for someone with production ML/MLOps experience who can build reliable data pipelines and API connectors at scale.

  • Software Engineer (Python/Django) — Kraken123 (Octopus Energy Group) — Kraken is the technology platform behind Octopus Energy Group, one of the largest renewable energy suppliers in the UK and expanding globally. The platform manages smart meter data, dynamic tariff optimization, and grid-balancing for millions of customers. A solid match for backend engineers comfortable with Python/Django in high-throughput data environments.

Today’s Jobs

  • Senior Full-Stack Engineer — Open Energy Transition — Open Energy Transition builds data infrastructure and modeling tools for national-scale energy system transitions, helping governments and grid operators plan decarbonization pathways. This role is a strong match if you’ve shipped production full-stack systems and can work with complex datasets across geographies.

  • Software Engineer (Data and AI Platform) — OVO — OVO Energy is a UK energy retailer that uses AI-driven demand forecasting and smart meter analytics to optimize grid usage and customer energy consumption. The role focuses on building their data and AI platform — directly relevant if you have experience running ML pipelines in production at scale.

Today’s Jobs

  • Senior Software Engineer, Consumer — Aurora Solar — Aurora Solar builds solar design and sales software that lets installers generate accurate energy production estimates and manage the sales-to-install pipeline for residential and commercial projects. The role likely involves working on consumer-facing features and integrating ML models for shade analysis and production forecasting — experience serving and maintaining models in production is directly relevant.

  • Senior Data Engineer — Enode — Enode builds energy management and IoT platforms that help companies monitor and optimize energy consumption in commercial buildings using sensor data and analytics. A senior data engineer role here would focus on building and maintaining data pipelines that feed into energy optimization models — core MLOps infrastructure work.

Today’s Jobs

  • ML Engineer - Computer Vision — Gaia AI — Gaia AI builds ML models for climate-relevant satellite imagery analysis, likely focused on land-use change, deforestation, or emissions monitoring from Earth observation data. The role is a strong match if you have experience deploying computer vision pipelines in production — model training, inference serving, and monitoring at scale are the core of what they need.

  • Computer Vision and Software Engineer — Neural Grader — Neural Grader uses computer vision and ML to automate agricultural grading and carbon measurement in farming operations. The hybrid CV + software engineering scope means you’d be building end-to-end systems — image capture, model inference, and the web/dashboards that surface results to customers — which maps well to production ML work with a full-stack edge.

Today’s Jobs

  • Software Engineer — Axle Energy — Axle Energy builds software platform that connects energy assets (batteries, renewables, demand response) to wholesale markets, handling real-time pricing and optimization at scale. This role involves building production systems that ingest high-frequency energy data and automate trading decisions—directly relevant if you’ve worked on event-driven architectures or low-latency ML pipelines.

  • Software Engineer — Axle Energy — Same company and core mission as above—connecting distributed energy resources to grid markets—but this appears to be a separate posting, possibly for a different team or seniority band. Worth applying to both if you want to maximize your odds at a company doing real-time energy optimization at scale.

Today’s Jobs

  • Senior Machine Learning Engineer, Platform — Samsara — Samsara builds cloud-connected IoT sensors and a data platform for fleet management, industrial equipment monitoring, and asset tracking, with heavy use of computer vision for driver and workplace safety. This role sits on their ML platform team, so production model serving, feature stores, and inference infrastructure at scale will be central — a direct fit for MLOps-heavy backgrounds.

  • Senior Full-Stack Engineer (Global | Remote | English) — Open Energy Transition — Open Energy Transition is a clean energy consultancy building software tools for energy system planning, grid modeling, and decarbonization strategy. This is a full-stack role, but if you’ve built data-intensive production systems and want to apply that to energy transition modeling, the stack overlap is real.

Today’s Jobs

  • Forward Deployed Engineer — Chalk — Chalk builds APIs and data infrastructure that connect energy data sources (grid telemetry, weather, market signals) into unified feeds for clean energy developers. This role is a strong match if you like shipping production backend systems that ingest and serve high-volume time-series data, though it’s Singapore-based and on-site.

  • Forward Deployed Engineer — Chalk — Same company as above, but UK-based (London). Same data infrastructure work — building APIs that normalize messy grid and energy datasets for downstream ML and analytics. Best fit if you’re open to London relocation and want to work at the intersection of energy data and production engineering.

Today’s Jobs

Senior Software Engineer, Computation (Remote) at Aurora Solar — Aurora Solar builds rooftop solar design and installation software used by solar installers across the U.S. The role involves scaling computational workflows for solar layout optimization, requiring expertise in distributed systems and production ML infrastructure.

Principal Engineer - (m/f/d) - Remote in DE/UK/PT at Cozero — Cozero provides carbon accounting software for businesses to measure and reduce emissions. As a principal engineer, you’d lead the design of scalable backend systems for processing enterprise carbon data, ideal for someone with experience in high-scale distributed systems.

Today’s Jobs

  • Principal AI Systems Engineer — Titan Advanced Energy Solutions — Titan builds AI-driven energy systems for grid and industrial optimization. The role centers on production-grade AI infrastructure and agent-based systems, which maps directly to someone who’s shipped ML pipelines at scale.

  • Senior Software Engineer — Station A — Station A builds an energy procurement and optimization platform that uses ML to help companies source and manage clean energy. The remote role involves backend systems that process energy market data in production, a solid fit for engineers with MLOps and high-throughput service experience.

Today’s Jobs

  • Senior Backend Engineer — Octopus Energy Group — Octopus Energy builds a proprietary energy retail platform (Kraken) that manages smart meter data, dynamic tariff optimization, and grid balancing for millions of customers. A senior backend role here would involve production-scale systems handling real-time energy data pipelines.

  • Senior Full-Stack Engineer (Global | Remote | English) — Open Energy Transition — Open Energy Transition develops open-source energy system modeling tools used by grid operators and policy researchers to simulate decarbonization pathways. This is a fully remote senior full-stack role working on the software infrastructure behind energy transition modeling.

Today’s Jobs

Senior Full Stack Software Engineer — Electric Air — Electric Air builds electric heat pump systems and the software to manage them. US-based with possible remote eligibility. Strong match for a senior engineer comfortable owning full-stack systems in a hardware-adjacent climate startup.

Machine Learning Engineer — Gridmatic — Gridmatic develops ML-driven trading and optimization software for wholesale electricity markets. This is a core ML engineering role where production experience building and shipping models translates directly.

Today’s Jobs

  • Staff Machine Learning Engineer - Wildfire — Overstory — Overstory builds satellite-based wildfire detection and environmental monitoring systems using computer vision. This role requires production ML engineering skills to deploy and maintain real-time wildfire prediction models at scale.

  • Staff Machine Learning Engineer - Wildfire — Overstory — Overstory builds satellite-based wildfire detection and environmental monitoring systems using computer vision. This role requires production ML engineering skills to deploy and maintain real-time wildfire prediction models at scale.
